title: Crisp Indian Cod Roast
description: A flavorful and crunchy Indian-inspired cod roast dish, perfect for a brunch gathering. This recipe features fermented cod, roasted to perfection with a blend of Indian spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cod fillets to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the cod from the marinade and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the cod with rice vinegar and let it sit at room temperature for 30 minutes to ferment slightly.
Drizzle the cod with vegetable oil and roast in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Increase the oven temperature to broil (high).
Broil the cod for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the cod from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
